posts.author: bri.d43 (Brianna)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be so helpful to have conditional coloring filters stay in the main table. Make it possible for us to choose where this conditional coloring applies rather than have to make it a new view.

For example, when an item’s status is set as “Stuck,” having the row always fill with one color in the main table would really emphasize the item with the problem.
